# MDSN

MDSN is a Markdown-first framework for building apps that humans and AI agents can both use.

It keeps content, operations, and follow-up interaction in the same page model so one app can serve both browsers and agents.

## Recommended starting points
- https://docs.mdsn.ai/
- https://docs.mdsn.ai/getting-started
- https://docs.mdsn.ai/what-is-mdsn
- https://docs.mdsn.ai/mdsn-vs-mcp
- https://docs.mdsn.ai/protocol/v1
- https://docs.mdsn.ai/understanding-mdsn
- https://docs.mdsn.ai/shared-interaction
- https://docs.mdsn.ai/application-structure
- https://docs.mdsn.ai/sdk
- https://docs.mdsn.ai/server-runtime
- https://docs.mdsn.ai/examples

## Packages
- https://www.npmjs.com/package/@mdsnai/sdk
- https://www.npmjs.com/package/create-mdsn

## Source
- https://github.com/mdsn-ai/mdsn
